name: Ammar Falah
title: Random Projection + Low-Rank Adapter MLPs
summary: Replaces MLP linear layers with W = R(seed) + alpha * BA. R is a frozen Gaussian regenerated from an 8-byte seed; only the low-rank adapter (A, B) is learned. Reference implementation of the 'Learning adapters on random linear maps' Request for PR. Single-seed pilot, two-rank ablation (16, 64). Best result at rank=64.
notes: Non-record submission. Single seed, no statistical-significance averaging. Rank=64 used as headline result; rank=16 included as ablation showing meaningful returns to adapter capacity (delta 0.034 nats).
